channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
item.description: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

item.title: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
item.description: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

item.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
item.description: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

item.title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
item.description: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

item.title: Crypto Biz: When dollars disappear, stablecoins step in
item.description: Bolivia moves to recognize USDT amid a dollar shortage, while Bitcoin miners’ AI ambitions face fresh investor scrutiny.

item.title: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development
item.description: Input Output is handing its core infrastructure to outside teams as ADA gets a lift from an imminent protocol upgrade.

item.title: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on
item.description: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.

item.title: Kimi K3 Just Triggered DeepSeek Flashbacks for the Stock Market
item.description: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model sent chip stocks tumbling and gave Wall Street a Friday it would rather forget.

item.title: China’s Kimi K3 Is Out—And Beats Claude Fable and GPT 5.6 Sol on Key Benchmarks
item.description: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter model tops Fable 5 on a creative writing benchmark and leads Arena AI's frontend code leaderboard—at Claude Sonnet pricing.

item.title: Stripe and Swift race to control the next generation of global payments infrastructure
item.description: Crypto and blockchain experts say this week's moves show the two established finance companies are increasingly competing for control of the infrastructure behind digital payments.

item.title: Galaxy Puts Its Name on Texas Tech's Stadium in a 15-Year, Crypto-Native Deal
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed digital-asset firm will rebrand the Red Raiders' home as "Galaxy Stadium." The bigger bet is on the cheap power and open land of West Texas.

item.title: OKX Europe lets users convert USDT to MiCA-compliant USDC
item.description: The feature offers European customers a voluntary path away from Tether’s USDT as MiCA rules reshape the region’s stablecoin market.

item.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
item.description: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

item.title: Cardano hands core development to outside teams in decentralization push
item.description: Input Output will transfer control of the Haskell node, Plutus, Hydra and other components as founder Charles Hoskinson says the network must change and start growing again.

item.title: Inside Robinhood’s high-stakes bet to onboard millions of casual users onto decentralized finance
item.description: The company says its advantage lies in bringing retail customers onchain, but early activity remains dominated by memecoins, while its original tokenization vision remains small.

item.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
item.description: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.

item.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
item.description: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

item.title: Three Men Jailed for Posing as Police in $5.3M UK Crypto Fraud
item.description: The gang built fake police websites to fool victims, then spent the stolen crypto on Rolexes and luxury holidays, the Met said.

item.title: Japan's SBI Group is building Asia's first cross-border digital asset empire
item.description: The securities giant announced today the consolidation of Singapore-based Coinhako as part of a rapid regional expansion that includes a tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance.

item.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
item.description: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.

item.title: The British Virgin Islands are a top crypto hub no one ever talks about: Here’s why
item.description: Kraken, Bitstamp, 1inch and Bitfinex have all set up shop in the British Virgin Islands — but you might find it tricky to book an on-site meeting with one of their executives.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Likely to Mirror Gold's History of Triumph and Pain.. New from me on how gold ETFs' 22-year history may offer the closest roadmap yet for Bitcoin ETF investors. Both are wrappers around non-yielding stores of value that generate no cash flow, lea - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1RXzdqaWFDOU1ucy1pdFhkX2lFNVRvMWU5d0xuVWN5QlpYZ2dkTXQyb1NCcEFNMVRrRkhtQ081alZBZEpQdndKVTR3T0Z2d3JTRWJZWUNlbTJPNTdZMzlHV3lSRjU?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETFs Likely to Mirror G…

item.title: Bitcoin faces fresh headwinds as China’s Kimi beats Claude, GPT in coding benchmark
item.description: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.

item.title: ⚖️LIVE: CRYPTO CLARITY ACT FACES HEARING TODAY IN BID TO REACH TRUMP’S DESK The US House will hold a hearing on the CLARITY Act today at 10:00 am ET as lawmakers push to advance the legislation before the August recess. A revised dr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBwSkd2U1RUSm9hRDl1b01pZHp2Y1FkcjJZUGVXbVBLQVZBOEsxWVJlOS1qQmRTU1BCeTA3UTNCYVRhT1dSdGFVSDZ5UGNGeVMtdDlUV0cyRU5nX2ZZMnFrcA?oc=5" target="_blank">⚖️LIVE: CRYPTO CLARITY ACT FACES HEA…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: NEW: Bitcoin Ordinals advocate Leonidas proposes Bitcoin $DOG Mode, an open-source Bitcoin removing restrictions on Runes and Ordinals transactions. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1PbE5DdmFlU1JaUUhQMENuRWl1WldKS0FSVjZfb2dVTm1MY0NwUjctYmd2UTR6eTVXd2VsYjB2UUpXOElQZEdOQUVOUWJuMWpaeHhibDg3VnU1NGFzOEJlZVNoN3I4Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Bitcoin Ordinals advoca…

item.title: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
item.description: The Rotterdam court said bankruptcy was necessary to ensure an orderly settlement because the company lacked enough assets to fully repay users.

item.title: Morning Minute: Citadel Securities Invests $400M in Crypto.com
item.description: Wall Street and crypto's convergence snapped into focus, while crypto majors gave back most of the week's gains as broader markets sold off.

item.title: Stablecoin growth will erode bank deposits, says ECB’s Cipollone
item.description: ECB’s Piero Cipollone said stablecoin adoption could erode bank deposits, but the digital euro will keep banks at the center of payments.

item.title: Every Bitcoin bear market has established a higher floor than the last. I fit a simple power-law model to the historical Bitcoin cycle lows. It estimates a cycle low of ~$61k for 2026, ~$188k by 2030, and ~$582k by 2035. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5yNnpHSlNYSWVQc29SRklOTkRjZ0FsOEpQN2lWdXl0VTJDZXZSVUlHZXhiSHJsYU5YSWpkZkMzeUNTOEF5Qlp3d202eDhFaXNLeDNTY1JPMld2QXNrVUJZVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Every Bitcoin bear market has establ…

item.title: AI frenzy losing steam leaves bitcoin less volatile than South Korean stocks
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 17, 2026

item.title: UK sentences 2 hackers tied to $115M crypto ransom scheme
item.description: The pair pleaded guilty after investigators linked them to the Scattered Spider cybercrime group, which US prosecutors say extorted dozens of companies.

item.title: Bitcoin Tests $63K as Long-Term Holders Keep Selling at a Loss
item.description: Some two-thirds of the coins moving onto exchanges are long-term holders taking losses, as a macro risk-off drags on Bitcoin’s price.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin returns to $63,000 as Nasdaq trims large early loss
item.description: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 level it reached on this week's soft inflation print.

item.title: 🚨 NEW: ESMA added 14 new crypto firms, including Ripple Payments Europe, to its MiCA register, bringing the total number of licensed crypto service providers to 294. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1iNTd3Z25WaVpFRFM1SGJpVVYzWm9hSkRrUmxudURZeXA1TldWdXFhMlNnUVJzS3FDMjExX1dNdGhpS3NtQXY4RnVuUmlyZjlVVDRqdGU2RGRmbXlrbUN0UmJic0g?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: ESMA added 14 new crypt…

item.title: ESMA adds 14 new CASPs to MiCA register as licensing slows
item.description: ESMA adds 14 CASPs to its MiCA register, with banks and Ripple Payments Europe among the new entries as total providers reach 294.

item.title: Risk-off wave drags bitcoin below $63,000 as AI selloff spreads from stocks to crypto
item.description: Crypto fell as AI stock fatigue and U.S.-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, though a technical measure hints at oversold conditions heading into the weekend.

item.title: Crypto.com Hits $20B Valuation After $400M Citadel Securities Investment
item.description: The market maker's stake marks Crypto.com's first institutional funding round, as Wall Street deepens its push into crypto.

item.title: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
item.description: Bitcoin supply in loss hit 50% nearly 50 days ago, mimicking the countdown to BTC price bear-market bottoms.

item.title: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
item.description: Federal prosecutors allege the South Dakota investor used false promises to raise money, repaid earlier investors with new funds and laundered proceeds through crypto exchanges.

item.title: A suspected crypto scammer has been arrested for stealing $220,000 by hiding malware inside Steam games FBI tracked him through his Uber Eats deliveries - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9RWElqNHE4LTZLeEtuMXFXNE50R3E1RHdXbExqV2VBM2RDaVk5WnhzdlpSU0pyb1BOa0ozbV9reEhyM0Z3QnFRenZYSEtIcmhXNHNhanVPMGFWWlBu?oc=5" target="_blank">A suspected crypto scammer has been arrest…

item.title: Airbnb CEO says X account was hacked, attacker posted AI-slop on tokenization
item.description: Brian Chesky regained control of his account and told any new crypto followers he would be a "disappointing follow".

item.title: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist
item.description: A macOS malware steals credentials to hijack Telegram sessions, decrypt cryptocurrency wallets or trick users into entering their wallet recovery phrases through fake applications.

item.title: Ether falls twice as hard as bitcoin and HYPE drops 10% as the chip trade unwinds
item.description: Japan's Nikkei had its worst day since March. Ether is still the only major holding a gain on the week, barely.

item.title: This $28 million ether market bet aims to profit from pure market chaos
item.description: The mega trade aims to profit from a potential surge in ether price turbulence.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs add $368M in three-day buying streak
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted $79.2 million on Thursday, lifting their three-day inflow total to about $368 million as Bitcoin attempted a price recovery.

item.title: Ordinals advocate Leonidas proposes new Bitcoin client: ‘$DOG Mode’
item.description: “Over time the economic incentives will drive $DOG Mode’s adoption and force Bitcoin Core to stop gatekeeping and allow these completely valid transactions,” said Leonidas.

item.title: DOG Mode vs. BIP-110: Inside the Bitcoin client built to bypass data restrictions
item.description: While BIP 110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.

item.title: Bitcoin under $63,000 after new U.S. strike on Iran. Trump's China comment adds to uncertainty
item.description: Geopolitical tensions and renewed fears of U.S.-China frictions are weighing on risk assets, including bitcoin.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act expected to be released today does not have Senate Democrat support, Politico reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBCbm5hR2tjT1h0YlYtWWlBRHJrT2dtUWtfXzlrU2NTdHpEUmREUFdPeS1wd0x5M1BFUHRZRTAyeENpTnZndHNSY3Y3enFDN1RVQlNvY3FZUVF5UVpGWlI0a1VB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act e…

item.title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
item.description: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
item.description: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

item.title: Glad crypto has trained me be extremely vigilant on this. From kichim premium in every crypto cycle now to memory stocks, Korea may be one of the cleanest late cycle indicators in global riskon assets. not just because Kr retail is exuberant degens, more on th - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
item.description: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.

item.title: New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $INJ (Injective Protocol) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1zcGhSejE3Zk5WUkNTUWUzbHRwZy1ldGJqTTlEYU84NE5mcXRtTTNDR1FKWER0Q1Zod2NoNjhCSzZpUDczRVlQeEJKSDBuZEY4U21lemJnbWZJLTFPTmRRN0pGcw?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: There's a Crypto Media Crisis UnfoldingI've been running a media company covering crypto since 2019. I've been through the ups and downs of the industry, so I know what a bear market feels like. This time around, it does feel different. As if something has str - x.com

item.title: Largest U.S. Retail Market Maker Citadel Securities Invests $400 Million in Crypto com at a $20 Billion Valuation Citadel Securities has invested $400 million in Crypto com at a $20 billion valuation, marking the crypto exchange’s first institutional funding round - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9sRDJOQ3ZxWXRMaFBnbTQ0ak1oTWtKYmp4b1dIUFZZc0FJZEhHOURoTm9Fb1FkcERRQTN3dUc3Z21ieVBscUpOY1lqMmFYNF85Z0ROZWNhUW0yUnU1V3ZGaVpJNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Largest U.S. Retail Market Maker…

item.title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
item.description: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.

item.title: 🚨 QUESTION: Could Bitcoin bounce $10,000 before falling into the high-$40,000s? In episode 3 of #TRADESECRETS, veteran trader @PeterLBrandt tells @itsciaranlyons he expects Bitcoin to bottom around early October, but warns a false breakout could co - x.com

item.title: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
item.description: Mira Murati's Inkling won't dethrone the best Chinese open-weights models, but it gives Western developers something they haven't yet had.
